markdown.markdown: We hold weekly lab meetings open to anyone interested. Come by, see what we're working on, and meet the team — no commitment required. **Location:** [Green Hall, GR 3.316](https://map.concept3d.com/?id=1772#!m/550863?share){target="_blank"} (Thomas Spencer Hall) ## Student Research Opportunities PRISE Lab offers hands-on research experience for undergraduate and graduate students at UT Dallas. No prior research experience is required — just genuine interest and reliability. We mentor students through every step of the research process. **Interested? [Apply here.](https://profiles.utdallas.edu/students/create){target="_blank"}** ### Campus Drinking Water Quality Study [UTD Green Fund](https://studentaffairs.utdallas.edu/initiatives/green-fund/){target="_blank"} student-led research initiative (Fall 2026) We are assembling a student team to test drinking water quality across campus for PFAS, lead, and other contaminants, survey the campus community on willingness to pay for improvements, and conduct a cost-benefit analysis of treatment options. We need students from three areas: - **Environmental Science** — field sampling, lab coordination, data interpretation - **Social Science / Economics / Public Policy** — survey design, econometric analysis - **Engineering** — water treatment costing, cost-benefit analysis To apply, email [erin.litzow@utdallas.edu](mailto:erin.litzow@utdallas.edu) and [elias.cisneros@utdallas.edu](mailto:elias.cisneros@utdallas.edu) with your name, major, year, which team interests you, and why.
